name: embed_text
description: Generate dense vector embeddings from text inputs using feature extraction models. These embeddings are useful for building semantic search engines, recommendation systems, and retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: The embedding model ID in 'org/model' format.

parameters.name: inputs
parameters.description: The text to generate embeddings for. Can also be an array of strings for batch processing.
parameters.example: Machine learning is a branch of artificial intelligence.

body.inputs: Machine learning is a branch of artificial intelligence.
